stemHtml: In which of the following conditions must an operator make sure an aircraft undergoes weighing?

options.a: Every 9 years individual aircraft masses are used.
options.b: When the cumulative changes to the dry operating mass (DOM) exceed +/- 5% of the maximum take-off mass.
options.c: Every 3 years individual aircraft masses are used.
options.d: When the cumulative changes to the dry operating mass (DOM) exceed +/- 0.5% of the maximum landing mass.
